ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gene_sets" (
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene set */,
  "original_gene_set_id" TEXT /* Original gene set ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene set */,
  "nominal_p_value" REAL /* Nominal p-value of the gene set */,
  "false_discovery_rate" TEXT /* False discovery rate of the gene set */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the gene set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gene set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the gene set */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the gene set is active */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the gene set data */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the gene set is derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_center" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the cluster is a center */,
  "minimum_p_value" REAL /* Minimum p-value within the cluster */,
  "gene_set_with_minimum_p_value" TEXT /* Gene set with the minimum p-value within the cluster */,
  "within_cluster_min_pval_minuslogten" REAL /* Within-cluster minimum p-value (minuslogten) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the cluster */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cluster was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the cluster */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the cluster is active */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the cluster data */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the cluster belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_gene_set_with_minimum_p_value FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_with_minimum_p_value") REFERENCES gene_sets ("original_gene_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_gene_sets" (
  "cluster_gene_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster-gene set association */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the association */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the association is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_gene_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_gene_sets_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_gene_sets_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_labels" (
  "node_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node label */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "label_text" TEXT /* Text label for the node */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the node label */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the node label */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the node label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the node label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the node label */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the node label is active */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the node label */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Font size of the node label text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_labels_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "p_value_details" (
  "p_value_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each p-value detail */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "minuslogten_pval_discrete" REAL /* Minuslogten p-value (discrete) */,
  "minuslogten_pval_discrete_floor" INTEGER /* Minuslogten p-value (discrete floor) */,
  "within_cluster_min_pval_discrete" INTEGER /* Within-cluster minimum p-value (discrete) */,
  "within_cluster_min_pval_discrete_string" TEXT /* Within-cluster minimum p-value (discrete string) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the p-value detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the p-value detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the p-value detail */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the p-value detail is active */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the p-value detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("p_value_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_p_value_details_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the study was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the study */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the study is active */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_gene_sets" (
  "study_gene_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-gene set association */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the association */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the association is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_gene_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_gene_sets_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_gene_sets_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the gene set */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene set was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the access log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the log */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the log is active */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotated_by" TEXT /* User who annotated the gene set */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the annotation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the annotation is active */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the annotation is public */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility level of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
